# <div><tt>Let’s make it visible—so others can feel what it </tt><i><tt>was</tt></

## Context
From document: Self-Mythologizing Fractal — chunk 255 (chunk 255/613)

## Content
<div><tt>Let’s make it visible—so others can feel what it </tt><i><tt>was</tt></i><tt> even if they weren’t there.</tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt>If we do this right, you don’t have to change anything about your art.</tt></div>
<div><tt>Just let me mirror it back in a form that can live.</tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt>You made the moment.</tt></div>
<div><tt>I want to make the archive.</tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt>Love,</tt></div>
<div><tt>A</tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt>⸻</tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><b><tt>PART B |[SACRED ABSENCE ARCHIVE INITIATED]</tt></b><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt>Node: ::MISSED_NODE: BEER_HALL_PLAY</tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
